R0198.title: Token Inflation/Deflation Vulnerability
R0198.definition: Token economic model vulnerabilities in smart contracts allow unauthorized minting (inflation) or burning (deflation) of tokens, disrupting economic balance.
R0198.description: Token economic model vulnerabilities in smart contracts allow unauthorized minting (inflation) or burning (deflation) of tokens, disrupting economic balance.
R0198.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
